name: Zuzugsfreibetrag - Median income researcher (EUR 4,500/month x 14)
description: Researcher earning EUR 63,000 with 30% Zuzugsfreibetrag tax relief, standard region

sources.description: Manually calculated: 30% ZZFB reduces taxable fraction to 70%, SV on full gross. Compared to base case net of EUR 42,700 - saving of ~EUR 5,787
